name: The Church
description:
Looking at the condition of the church, you wonder what kind of bishop would
allow a church's condition to get so bad.  As you look around, you notice a
sign that reads Church of the Pythons.  After a moment of pondering, you
realize that this is the home of the famed Bishop from Monty Python.  
Remember...  The Bishop is watching YOU!  Second Avenue is to the south.

extra_descriptions.description:
The sign reads Church of the Pythons.  Like you didn't already know that,
duh!
